This framework learns 3D-aware attributes represented as special words that can be incorporated into text prompts for fine-grained image generation.
Continuous 3D Words enables fine-grained control over various attributes in the generated images.
The framework's simplicity and effectiveness suggest potential for interesting applications in the vision community.
